title: Escape Doubting Castle
description: Despair edits memory. Search again for the key called Promise, and unlock what fear called final.
description_zh: 绝望会改写记忆。再寻找那把名叫“应许”的钥匙，打开惧怕称为终局的门。

steps.description: Find Promise in the cell or in your own breast pocket.
steps.description_zh: 在牢房里，或在自己胸袋里，找到应许。

steps.description: Unlock the door before hopelessness feels like home.
steps.description_zh: 在无望变得像家一样熟悉前，打开那扇门。
